title: ApprovalScheme
description: An approval scheme defining the approval process.

approverType.description: The type of approver. APP_OWNER is the application owner, OWNER is the access profile/role owner, SOURCE_OWNER is the source owner, MANAGER is the requesting user's manager, and GOVERNANCE_GROUP is a governance group.

approverId.description: The ID of the approver. Only required when approverType is GOVERNANCE_GROUP.
